shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- repo status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- top-level ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g 'package.json' -g 'src/**' | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-hook-form disabled useForm setValue shouldDirty dirtyFields formState" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '100,210p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '380,430p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && rg -n \"const _getDirty|_getDirty =|_formState\\.isDirty\" src/logic/createFormControl.ts | head -40 && rg -n \"disabled\" src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx src/__tests__/useForm/setValue.test.tsx src/__tests__/useForm/*.test.tsx | tail -80"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '735,770p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '790,875p' src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx; git show 65599cce"'^:src/logic/createFormControl.ts | sed -n '"'420,490p'"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '830,900p' src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx; rg -n \"getFieldState\\(\" src/__tests__/useForm | head -30; sed -n '1260,1300p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts"

/bin/bash -lc 'git diff -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/useForm.ts src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx && node_modules/.bin/jest --config ./scripts/jest/jest.config.js src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx --runInBand'

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes" && cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/react-hook-form-disabled-dirty.md" <<'"'EOF'
# Separate disabled interaction state from explicit dirty requests

Disabled-form guards should suppress dirty and touched updates caused by user interaction, but an explicit programmatic dirty request must still run dirty comparison and state notification. Any root-level dirty synchronization that treats disabled forms as always pristine must also avoid erasing that explicitly tracked state.
EOF
mempal ingest \""'$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals
node_modules/.bin/prettier --check src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/useForm.ts src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx
git diff --check
git diff -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/useForm.ts src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
